case_title: JOHN MOORE VS. ITOYA OF AMERICA, LTD et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT WITH ITOYA OF AMERICA LTD. IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THE REFORMULATION AND WARNING PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE AND COMPLIANT WITH THE LAW. THE FEES AND PENALTY PROVISIONS ARE ALSO REASONABLE. ORDER AND JUGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRIAN JOHNSON OF THE CHANLER LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. (510) 848-8110 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment With Itoya of America Ltd. IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THE REFORMULATION AND WARNING PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE AND COMPLIANT WITH THE LAW. THE FEES AND PENALTY PROVISIONS ARE ALSO REASONABLE. ORDER AND JUGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
